sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114312" key="xoirospe/leqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοιρο-σπέλεθος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114312.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀνόκλεια</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
